base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pipe_cap_green_palette0 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Pipe cap — 2 tiles wide × 1 tile tall. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pipe cap — 2 tiles wide × 1 tile tall; green overworld palette; mates with pipe body tiles for warp/obstacle composition
